title: Allow updates on statuses on restricted columns
excerpt:
Allow the creation of updates on a status (the little + in the upper right corner of a status) on a column which is restricted and the user cannot edit.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Allow the creation of updates on a status (the little + in the upper right corner of a status) on a column which is restricted and the user cannot edit.

just because they can’t change the status doesnt mean they shouldnt be able to create updates that reference that column and status.
